summary:
Claim: Learning disability is not a typical feature of infants born to diabetic mothers.  
Evidence: - Ketotic hypoglycemia and obesity are well-documented consequences of maternal hyperglycemia. - Learning disabilities lack consistent epidemiological support compared to other features.  
Answer: B
